title: No Cheating
description: No hacked clients, x-ray, duping, or exploits. Approved client-side mods are listed on our Modpacks page. If you're unsure about a mod, ask staff first.

title: Be Respectful & Have Fun!
description: No harassment, hate speech, doxxing, or excessive toxicity. PvP banter is fine — real malice is not. Keep it fun for everyone.

title: No Spamming
description: Don't flood chat, abuse caps lock, or spam commands. Keep it readable for everyone.
